Foam Machine Rental in Hantsport NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals offers foam machine rentals for kids' events in Hantsport NS. Our high-output foam machine blasts kid-safe, non-toxic foam into a wild foam zone that kids love. Available as a standalone rental or as an add-on with any inflatable rental, party package, or lawn games booking. For children's events only — not available for adult-only events or events where alcohol is being served.

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. We serve Hantsport NS and surrounding areas. Travel fee applies after the first 15 km from Bridgewater ($0.72/km). Final travel cost confirmed with your quote.

Featured Rentals

  • Kids Foam Party - Foam Party, From $200/hr add-on · From $349/hr standalone, Wet-use - High-energy foam fun for kids' birthdays, school fun days, daycares, summer camps, church events, and family celebrations.

Best For

  • Kids Birthday Parties
  • School Fun Days
  • Daycare and Summer Camp Events
  • Church Kids Events
  • Community Family Events

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you offer foam machine rentals in Hantsport?
Yes. Nova Kingdom Rentals provides foam machine rentals in Hantsport NS. Contact us to confirm availability and travel cost for your event date.
How much does a foam machine rental cost?
Standalone: Up to 30 kids $349/hr, 31–80 kids $599/hr, 80+ kids from $800/hr. Add-on with any inflatable: Up to 30 kids $200/hr, 31–80 kids $350/hr, 80+ kids from $650/hr. Delivery additional.
Is the foam safe for kids?
Yes. Nova Kingdom Rentals uses kid-safe, non-toxic foam. Foam Party is designed for children ages 3–14. It is not available for adult events or events where alcohol is being served. Adult (19+) supervision required at all times.
Can I add a foam machine to an inflatable rental?
Yes. Foam machine rental is available as an add-on with any inflatable rental, party package, or lawn games booking. Add-on pricing starts at $200/hr for up to 30 kids.
What does foam machine setup require?
Outdoor setup only on a flat grassy area. Water source and hose access required. Power access (standard household outlet) required. Safe drainage area required.
Is booking confirmed when I submit a request?
No. Submitting a request does not confirm your booking. Availability, travel cost, and pricing are confirmed manually before your rental is finalized.

Book a foam machine rental in Hantsport
